case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. RHONDA BLACK et al

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as reassignment from the PJ Department for Court Trial.
Judge: Herbert Donalson, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., for Plaintiff, Vanessa Portillo agent for plaintiff also present.
Defendant: Rhonda Black, present in pro per.
Parties have reached a settlement for entry of judgment on
the premises located at 217 Eddy St., #611 San Francisco.
Stipulation for judgment signed and filed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-26-2003 Continued To Jun-30-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearling this day for Settlement Hearing.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. vallejo, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Michael S. Rossoff for Plaintiff.
No appearance by the Defendant.
Jury demand is stricken, to proceed as Court Trial.
